claims.description: No version-pinned filenames (vN.N.N) outside CHANGELOG and .planning/milestones/v*-phases/. Catches §0.3-class drift.

verifier.command: find docs scripts -type f | grep -E 'v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' | grep -v CHANGELOG || true

claims.description: docs/index.md hero must show a package-manager install command (brew/binstall/curl|sh/PowerShell-irm) BEFORE any 'git clone https://' or 'cargo build --release' source-compile snippet. Catches §0.2 drift. Bare prose 'git clone' (e.g. 'agent can git clone') does NOT trip the check — only URL-form source builds.

verifier.command: python3 -c "import re,sys; t=open('docs/index.md').read(); pm=re.search(r'(?im)(?:brew install|cargo binstall|curl[^\n]*\| ?sh|powershell[^\n]*irm)', t); src=[m.start() for m in re.finditer(r'(?im)git clone https?://|cargo build --release', t)]; first_src=min(src) if src else None; sys.exit(0 if pm and (first_src is None or pm.start() < first_src) else 1)"

claims.description: README.md must show a package-manager install command BEFORE any 'git clone https://' or 'cargo build --release' source-compile snippet. §0.2.

verifier.command: python3 -c "import re,sys; t=open('README.md').read(); pm=re.search(r'(?im)(?:brew install|cargo binstall|curl[^\n]*\| ?sh|powershell[^\n]*irm)', t); src=[m.start() for m in re.finditer(r'(?im)git clone https?://|cargo build --release', t)]; first_src=min(src) if src else None; sys.exit(0 if pm and (first_src is None or pm.start() < first_src) else 1)"

claims.description: Every docs/benchmarks/*.md must appear in mkdocs.yml nav OR in not_in_nav. No benchmark behind an absolute github URL. §0.4.

verifier.command: python3 -c "import sys,pathlib,re; y=open('mkdocs.yml').read(); missing=[p.name for p in pathlib.Path('docs/benchmarks').glob('*.md') if p.name not in y]; print('\n'.join(missing)); sys.exit(1 if missing else 0)"

claims.description: No loose v*ROADMAP*.md / v*REQUIREMENTS*.md outside *phases/ or .planning/archive/. §0.5.

verifier.command: find .planning/milestones -maxdepth 2 \( -name '*ROADMAP*' -o -name '*REQUIREMENTS*' \) | grep -v phases | grep -v archive || true

claims.description: Every docs/**/*.md must be in mkdocs.yml nav: OR in not_in_nav: OR a redirect_maps target. mkdocs --strict already enforces this; this row is a tripwire if --strict is ever softened.

verifier.command: bash scripts/check-docs-site.sh > /dev/null 2>&1

claims.description: docs/how-it-works/filesystem-layer.md — playwright walk on a cache-cold navigation must show every <pre.mermaid> block has at least one <svg> child AND zero render-error console messages. §0.1 + §0.1.b.

verifier.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('.planning/verifications/playwright/how-it-works/filesystem-layer.json'); sys.exit(2) if not p.exists() else None; d=json.loads(p.read_text()); mc=d.get('mermaid_count',0); sv=d.get('svg_counts',[]); ce=d.get('console_errors',[]); sys.exit(0 if (mc==0 or (len(sv)==mc and all(x>0 for x in sv))) and not ce else 1)"

claims.description: Most recent COMPLETED CI workflow run on origin/main must have conclusion=success. §3a.

verifier.command: test "$(gh run list --branch main --workflow CI --status completed --limit 1 --json conclusion --jq '.[0].conclusion')" = success

claims.description: crates.io max_version of reposix-core must equal workspace version (0.11.1). §3b.

verifier.command: v=$(curl -s https://crates.io/api/v1/crates/reposix-core | grep -o '"max_version":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*://;s/"//g'); test "$v" = "0.11.1"
